title: pleiarina tetrasperma var. ichnostachya
intro: Pleiarina tetrasperma var. ichnostachya, also known as Wild Lettuce or Lop Cheong, is a variety of plant in the Asteraceae family, commonly used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it beneficial for relieving menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Pleiarina tetrasperma var. ichnostachya include reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and alleviating digestive issues, among others. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
